title: The Woman of the Port
writer: Carlos de Nájera, Antonio Guzmán Aguilera, Guy de Maupassant
actors: Andrea Palma, Domingo Soler, Francisco Zárraga
plot: Rosario (Palma) becomes a prostitute after losing her father and discovering her boyfriend had a liaison with another woman. In Veracruz, Rosario lives above a sordid cabaret "selling her love to the men coming from the sea." One ...
